title: Charred Cozy Mexican Chicken Tacos
description: A cozy Mexican dish featuring charred chicken, crunchy graham cracker crumbs, and fresh toppings, all wrapped in a warm tortilla. This egg-free friendly recipe is perfect for a weeknight dinner.
instructions: Preheat the grill to medium-high heat, making sure it reaches 400 degrees Fahrenheit.
In a large bowl, whisk together olive oil, lime juice, and taco seasoning.
Add the chicken pieces to the bowl and toss to coat with the marinade.
Sprinkle the graham cracker crumbs over the chicken and toss again to coat evenly.
Grill the chicken for 5-6 minutes per side, or until it reaches an internal temperature of 165 degrees Fahrenheit.
Warm the tortillas by wrapping them in a damp paper towel and microwaving for 20-30 seconds.
Assemble the tacos by placing the charred chicken onto a tortilla, followed by shredded cheese, diced tomatoes, and chopped cilantro.
